heroHeadline: AMLO's 4T Legacy: Judges Elected, Refinery Burning, and Morena Controls All Three Branches
heroSubtitle: Six years of 4T governance — 13.4 million lifted from poverty, 166,000+ homicides, $28B Tren Maya — now being tested: June 2025 judicial elections gave Morena the Supreme Court at 13% turnout; Dos Bocas refinery fires kill 5
footerNote: Data sourced from INEGI, CONEVAL, SESNSP, Banco de México, Diario Oficial, Animal Político, Reforma, Reuters, CNN, Al Jazeera, Mexico News Daily, and CSIS
